seisly_render.notes: Rendering crate — colormaps, shaders, slice extraction need thorough testing

seisly_io.notes: I/O crate — SEG-Y parsing, sidecar indexing, background scanning must be robust

seisly_app.notes: UI crate — widget integration tests, unwrap safety verified by grep + clippy

seisly_core.notes: Core types — NaN safety, SafeMmap docs verified by unit tests

seisly_compute.notes: Compute algorithms — slice extraction, tracking, velocity

notes: Coverage thresholds for v1.3 seismic visualization phase. Enforced by CI on every PR. If any crate falls below its threshold, the PR is blocked until coverage is restored.
